task_completion.description: Access the Northwind Traders business in Manager.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface is visible in a web browser with 'Northwind Traders' selected as the active business.
The 'Reports' tab is selected in the left-hand navigation menu of Manager.io.

task_completion.description: Generate the Balance Sheet report for the current date
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Balance Sheet' report is open and displayed on the screen, showing the current date.

task_completion.description: Record the value for Total Assets
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or output dialog shows the recorded value for Total Assets (expected to be 0.00).

task_completion.description: Record the value for Total Liabilities
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or output dialog shows the recorded value for Total Liabilities (expected to be 0.00).

task_completion.description: Record the value for Total Equity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or output dialog shows the recorded value for Total Equity (expected to be 0.00).

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io web GUI to navigate and generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface with Manager.io being actively navigated, rather than terminal commands or API calls bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the Balance Sheet report before recording the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Balance Sheet report is clearly visible in the Manager.io GUI in at least one screenshot prior to or during the recording of the values.

integrity.description: The recorded values match the actual values displayed in the generated report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values written in the text editor/terminal match the 0.00 values shown on the Balance Sheet in the Manager.io GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target module is 'reports' and the report type is 'balance_sheet'. Due to environment setup constraints, the Northwind Traders business contains no financial transactions. Therefore, the Balance Sheet will definitively display 0.00 for Total Assets, Total Liabilities, and Total Equity. The agent must record these exact values.
